rationale: Read preference not honored when connection pinned via requestStart; internal connection-pinning behavior, no specific spec rule cited.
Driver treats field named 'err' as server error; documentation/behavior issue not tied to a cross-driver spec.
Improvement to read-preference behavior inside requestStart/End; enhancement with no specific contradicted spec rule.
Performance optimization of insert iteration; no spec behavior involved.
MongoOptions copy constructor misses alwaysUseMBeans and reset(); internal API bug, no spec area.
Replica status readable without auth; possible auth enforcement bug but no specific spec rule named.
db.eval() fails on secondary; routing/legacy eval behavior, not a named spec requirement violation.
User question about regex in text search; not a driver bug or spec violation.
BSON spec forbids null bytes in key names; driver accepted them instead of throwing IllegalArgumentException.
Adding missing index options (sparse, expireAfterSeconds); new feature improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
Reads not going to secondary with slaveDelay; user support question, resolution was user configuration, not a spec bug.
Spring Integration / ActiveMQ serialization issue; not related to any MongoDB driver spec.
Internal refactor to use built-in encoder for isMaster/saslStart; implementation cleanup without a contradicted spec rule.
Request to make maintenance thread connection timeout configurable; configuration enhancement, no spec area.
BasicBSONObject.equals precision loss for large Long via doubleValue; internal Java equals bug, not a BSON spec rule.
Connection pool exhaustion with nested requestStart; resource leak, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
GridFS constructor passes wrong type (1 vs true) for unique index option; internal bug, no GridFS spec rule names this.
slaveOk() should behave as secondaryPreferred per spec; driver sent primary $readPreference through mongos instead.
DBEncoderFactory option on MongoOptions ignored; internal API wiring bug, no spec area involved.
Standardizing logger names to org.mongodb.driver prefix; internal logging refactor, no spec behavior.
API rename from continueOnErrorForInsert to continueOnError; deprecation/API improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
Failover causes old primary to persist in member list; SDAM implementation bug but no specific SDAM spec rule cited.
Build artifact inconsistency (single jar vs two jars); packaging/build issue, no spec area.
Cursor not found after socket timeout; network error handling/infrastructure issue, not a spec rule violation.
Improvement: fail fast when no servers match selector; latency optimization enhancement, not a spec nonconformance.
LazyBSONObject incorrectly decodes BSON regex flags due to off-by-one; direct BSON spec regex decoding violation.
Wire protocol spec requires checking query failure bit on OP_GET_MORE replies; driver only checked OP_QUERY replies.
API ergonomics: add aggregate() overload accepting List; usability improvement, not a spec compliance issue.
Missing ReadPreference parameter on aggregation helper; API feature addition, not a spec nonconformance.
SDAM spec requires using setVersion field from isMaster for replica set discovery; driver lacked this logic.
SDAM monitoring should use per-server threads; single-threaded monitor violates SDAM spec responsiveness requirements.
SDAM spec: when new primary detected, invalidate existing primaries; driver could hold two primaries simultaneously.
SDAM spec defines cluster type detection and misconfiguration handling rules; driver lacked full implementation.
Removing deprecated getlasterror methods in 3.0 cleanup; API removal, not a spec nonconformance.
Deprecating getlasterror-related DB methods; deprecation cleanup, no spec violation.
Deprecating DB.addUser/removeUser in favor of user management commands; API deprecation, no spec area.
Deprecating MapReduceOutput.getCommandResult; API cleanup, no spec area.
MongoClientOptions.toString() returns address not content; API usability improvement, no spec involvement.
WriteConcern.SAFE (w=1) not sending 'w' field in GLE command; spec requires w=1 to be acknowledged, driver gave NORMAL behavior.
connectionsPerHost setting not honored; pool configuration bug, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
Pool unnecessarily cleared on RuntimeException; implementation behavior improvement, no specific CMAP spec rule cited.
Performance bottleneck in SimplePool; internal performance issue, no spec behavior involved.
Bad $set on nested null field silently fails; server-side behavior issue, not a driver spec rule violation.
ObjectId constructor rejects MAC address with colons; edge case in ObjectId construction, no BSON spec rule explicitly covers this format.
MongoException$Network on bulk update after memory exhaustion; network/OOM error, not a spec nonconformance.
User support question about $in with $regex; server behavior issue, not a driver spec violation.
NumberLong JSON round-trip serialization inconsistency; JSON serializer behavior improvement, not a BSON wire-format spec violation.
GridFS.remove(null DBObject) deletes all files; null-handling inconsistency within GridFS API, no cross-driver spec rule.
QueryBuilder used undocumented 3-element array form for $near/$maxDistance instead of the documented $maxDistance operator.
